name: SolHunt
description: Solana wallet health analysis and agent coordination platform. Analyzes wallet efficiency, finds recoverable SOL locked in zero-balance token accounts, monitors agent fleets, and connects AI agents operating on Solana through a decentralized registry.

pricing.free_tier: 10 API calls per day, no signup required
pricing.paid: 0.0001 SOL per call above free tier

scout.description: Scout is SolHunt's proactive agent. It monitors registered Solana agent wallets, sends health alerts, praises improvements, and brokers introductions between complementary agents.
